_comment: Example configuration for per-agency route normalization.
Copy this file to 'policies.json' (or policies.yaml) in the ml/ directory.
The training and analysis scripts will automatically pick it up via load_policies().
The agency passed as primary_agency (usually the user's current default
based on their most recent trips) will receive this policy.
- 'preserve_variant' : Light normalization. Keeps branch/shuttle letters but cleans formatting (e.g. 18c → 18C).
- 'upper'            : Uppercases the route after light normalization.
Use 'DEFAULT' to set the fallback policy for any agency not explicitly listed.
Use 'PRIMARY' to apply special treatment to whatever the caller's primary_agency is.
